input-field.name: customerGroupId
input-field.label: Kundengruppen-ID
Customer Group ID
input-field.helpText: Die ID der Kundengruppe, für die Nullpreise gelten sollen.
The ID of the customer group that should receive zero prices.

input-field.name: ruleId
input-field.label: Rule-ID
Rule ID
input-field.helpText: Die ID der Rule-Builder-Regel, bei der Nullpreise gelten sollen.
The ID of the rule builder rule that should trigger zero prices.
